subject: FarmThru opens to investors very soon
preheader: The Birchal campaign is almost live. VIP members get first access.
body:
Quick update.

FarmThru's equity crowdfunding campaign on Birchal opens very soon. For the first time, you can invest in the grocery store that connects regenerative farms directly to families.

Here is what to expect.

The campaign page on Birchal will include our full disclosure document. It covers our financials, our risks, the team, and how the funds will be used. Read it carefully. Take your time.

If you are a VIP member, you get early access before the campaign opens to everyone. That means you can review the disclosure document and invest before the general waitlist.

If you have not secured VIP access yet, there is still time. A $5 refundable deposit is all it takes.

The terms: minimum investment $50, maximum $10,000 per investor.

Investing in early-stage businesses carries real risk. You could lose some or all of your investment. Consider seeking independent financial advice. Full details in the disclosure document on Birchal.

We will send you the link the moment the campaign goes live.

Rachel & the FarmThru team
creative_brief: Countdown email. Short, punchy paragraphs. Countdown visual or 'launching soon' badge in header. Single VIP CTA button. Birchal badge. Compliance clearly visible but not dominating. Urgency through clarity, not artificial pressure.
